stories.title: Father's Day 2026 — COS Guide, One Week Away (June 21)
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Father's Day is one week away (Sunday, June 21). Colorado Springs families have excellent options: Pikes Peak Highway free admission for dads (reservation required), U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Museum 50% off for dads, ProRodeo Hall of Fame 20% off men's wear and drinkware, Colorado Wolf & Wildlife Center Father's Day wolf tour 9-11 AM, Garden of the Gods free hiking year-round, Victory Car Show, local restaurant specials. Practical guide for COS families to celebrate with kids.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Father's Day is ONE WEEK away. COS families — here are the freebies: Pikes Peak Highway (free for dads, reservation required), USOPM 50% off, Garden of the Gods always free. 🏔️ #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Colorado Springs dads can howl with wolves this Father's Day — the Colorado Wolf & Wildlife Center hosts a morning tour June 21. Spots are limited. Book now. 🐺 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Father's Day in Colorado Springs: Free and Discounted Activities for June 21

research.facts:
Father's Day 2026 — COS Guide
**Sources:** visitcos.com, koaa.com, pikes-peak.com, cospringsmom.com, allevents.in
**Confirmed Facts:**
- [HIGH] Father's Day 2026: Sunday, June 21 (third Sunday of June — consistent every year) — HIGH
- [HIGH] Pikes Peak Highway — free admission for dads on Father's Day; reservation required for timed entry (Source: koaa.com, pikes-peak.com) — confirm "dads get in free" wording
- [MEDIUM] U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Museum: 50% off admission for dads on Father's Day (Source: koaa.com/visitcos.com — single source, not cross-referenced) — use, flag for review
- [MEDIUM] ProRodeo Hall of Fame: 20% off men's wear and drinkware on Father's Day (Source: koaa.com — single source) — use, flag for review
- [MEDIUM] Colorado Wolf & Wildlife Center: Father's Day wolf tour 9-11 AM, space limited, breakfast burritos (Source: allevents.in, mbskco.org — single source each) — use, flag for review
- [HIGH] Garden of the Gods: always free, no admission charge, public land (Source: coloradosprings.gov — well-established) — HIGH
- [MEDIUM] Victory Car Show: Father's Day weekend, COS, cars + bikes + music + food (Source: allevents.in — single source)
**Notes:** Father's Day COS guide should focus on confirmed free/discounted options and encourage families to verify details directly before visiting.

stories.title: Pikes Peak Pride — Family Guide for TODAY
stories.angle: NEW STORY — Pikes Peak Pride Fest 2026 continues TODAY (Sunday, June 14). Parade starts at 10 AM near Acacia Park, marches south on Tejon Street to Alamo Square Park. Festival at Alamo Square / Colorado Springs Pioneers Museum, 10 AM – 6 PM. Family-friendly: Rainbow Youth Square for kids and teens, 150+ vendors, 25+ live entertainment acts. Free to attend. Located in downtown COS.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Pikes Peak Pride Parade starts at 10 AM TODAY in downtown COS — near Acacia Park south on Tejon to Alamo Square. Festival runs 10 AM-6 PM. Free for all. Rainbow Youth Square for kids. 🌈 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Pikes Peak Pride Festival is happening NOW at Alamo Square Park, downtown Colorado Springs. 150+ vendors, live entertainment, free admission. Families welcome all afternoon. 🌈 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: D49 Free Summer Meals — 5 Days Left, D11 Continues Through July
stories.angle: FOLLOW-UP (covered June 13) — D49 free summer meals end June 19, just 5 days away. Springs Ranch Elementary is the only D49 site. D11 sites continue through July 31, serving any child ages 1-18 regardless of district. No registration, no ID, no income verification. Critical transition guide: families relying on D49 meals need to know where to go after June 19.

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: D49 free summer meals end June 19 — just 5 days away. Springs Ranch Elementary only. Ages 1-18, no registration needed. After June 19: D11 sites continue through July 31. 🍽️ #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: D49 free meals end June 19. D11 picks up through July 31 — multiple COS sites, ages 1-18, no ID or registration. Families from any district welcome. Don't miss a meal this summer. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D49 Free Summer Meals End June 19 — Where COS Families Go Next

research.facts:

- [HIGH] D49 site: Springs Ranch Elementary only (Source: pipeline research, d49.org)
- [HIGH] Ages 1-18, free breakfast and lunch, no registration/ID/income verification required (Source: kktv.com, Colorado Dept of Education)

stories.title: Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recall — Fall Hazard, 25,000+ Units
stories.angle: NEW STORY — CPSC Recall 26-490 (issued May 14, 2026): approximately 25,235 Guidecraft Classic and Contemporary Kitchen Helper Towers recalled for fall hazard. Internal platform can loosen and detach over time. 11 falls reported, 3 injuries. Sold June 2022-October 2023 at Amazon, Wayfair, Walmart, Target, Maisonette, and Overstock for approximately $200. Remedy: repair kit — contact Guidecraft at 800-524-3555 or ProductSupport@guidecraft.com or guidecraft.com/pages/product-recall.

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: RECALL ALERT: ~25,000 Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Towers recalled for fall hazard. Platform can loosen and detach. 11 falls, 3 injuries. Sold 2022-2023 at Amazon, Target, Walmart. Stop use now. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower recall: remedy is a FREE repair kit. Call 800-524-3555 or visit guidecraft.com/pages/product-recall. CPSC Recall 26-490. Don't wait — 11 falls reported. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recalled: What COS Parents Need to Do Now

research.facts:
Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Tower Recall
**Sources:** cpsc.gov, schiffmanfirm.com, dailyhornet.com, recallmom.substack.com, newsweek.com
**Confirmed Facts:**
- [HIGH] CPSC Recall 26-490: Guidecraft Children's Standing Towers recalled for fall hazard (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Recall issued May 14, 2026 (Source: cpsc.gov via schiffmanfirm.com)
- [HIGH] Units: approximately 25,235 (Source: cpsc.gov, dailyhornet.com) — HIGH (multiple sources)
- [HIGH] Models: Classic and Contemporary Kitchen Helper Towers, 9 colors (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Hazard: platform inside tower can loosen over time, become unstable or detach — fall hazard to young children (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Reports: 11 falls reported, 3 injuries (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Sale period: June 1, 2022 through October 31, 2023 (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Retailers: Guidecraft.com, Amazon, Wayfair, Walmart, Target, Maisonette, Overstock (Source: cpsc.gov, newsweek.com)
- [HIGH] Price: approximately $200 (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Remedy: repair (Source: cpsc.gov)
- [HIGH] Contact: toll-free 800-524-3555, Mon-Fri 8 AM-8 PM ET (Source: cpsc.gov via search)
- [HIGH] Email: ProductSupport@guidecraft.com (Source: cpsc.gov via search)
- [HIGH] Recall page: www.guidecraft.com/pages/product-recall (Source: cpsc.gov via search)

stories.title: Colorado Renaissance Festival — Summer Run Continues Through August 2
stories.angle: FOLLOW-UP (opening weekend covered June 13) — Colorado Renaissance Festival's 49th season continues every Saturday and Sunday through August 2 in Larkspur (about 30 min from COS). Magical Fantasy theme. King Soopers discount tickets ($29 adult, $14 youth, free for under 5). Upcoming themed weekends and family planning guide. What to expect if families missed opening weekend.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Missed opening weekend of the Colorado Renaissance Festival? No worries — it runs every Sat and Sun through Aug 2 in Larkspur. Grab King Soopers tickets ($29/$14/free under 5). 🏰 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting
